overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a grey suit walking through a modern medical facility lobby with teal accents, orange seating, and distinctive green wall decorations. The character moves steadily from the entrance area toward the exit doors.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the medical lobby entrance toward the back of the facility

notable_agents.action: seated patient waiting in orange chair near the medical signage

entered.detail: large circular teal signage with 'Reliant Medical' text mounted on the right wall
row of orange upholstered chairs arranged along the right side of the lobby
long counter with glass top and plants on the right side of the lobby
large glass doors at the far end of the lobby leading to the outside
tropical plants in pots near the medical signage and reception area

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the entrance of a modern medical facility lobby. Teal 'Reliant Medical' signage is prominent on the right wall above orange waiting chairs, where a single NPC sits waiting. The reception desk runs along the right side, and glass exit doors are visible at the far end of the marble-floored space.

scene_state.functional_zone: medical facility corridor with decorative wall

events.description: passing from entrance area into corridor section with prominent green wall decoration

agents.ego_description: continuing through the lobby corridor past the decorative green wall

entered.detail: wall covered in circular green relief patterns and decorative elements
modern white bench seating against the green decorated wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves into the central corridor of the lobby where a distinctive green wall with circular patterns dominates the left side. The medical signage and entrance seating have passed out of view behind, while the reception desk remains visible on the right and the exit doors grow closer ahead.

events.description: approaching the glass exit doors at the end of the lobby corridor

agents.ego_description: approaching the glass exit doors at the end of the lobby

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the end of the lobby corridor, with the glass exit doors now dominating the center view. Natural light filters through the doors from outside. The green decorative wall and white bench have fallen behind, while the reception desk recedes into the distance on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a modern medical lobby that transitions from a branded reception area toward a bright exit. It begins at the entrance, passing teal Reliant Medical signage and orange waiting chairs where a single person sits. As the character moves forward, the entrance seating recedes and the view shifts toward a central corridor dominated by a distinctive green wall with circular patterns on the left. The scene then opens further as the reception desk falls behind and the camera approaches the far end of the marble-floored space. Finally, the decorative walls give way to glass exit doors that fill the frame, allowing natural light to filter in from the outside.
